      "description": "Create the backtesting engine \u2014 runs strategies against historical data and calculates performance metrics",
      "file_text": "\"\"\"\nBacktesting Engine \u2014 runs a strategy against historical candle data.\n\nSimulates the full trading loop offline: for each candle, the engine\nruns the strategy, executes paper trades, enforces risk limits, and\ntracks every trade. At the end it calculates performance metrics like\nSharpe ratio, max drawdown, win rate, etc.\n\nUsage:\n    python -m agent.backtest                         # uses defaults\n    python -m agent.backtest --strategy rsi           # test RSI strategy\n    python -m agent.backtest --pair BTC/USDT --days 90\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport math\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport pandas as pd\nimport structlog\n\nfrom agent.config import AgentConfig, RiskConfig\nfrom agent.strategies.base import BaseStrategy, Signal\nfrom agent.strategies.loader import load_strategy\nfrom execution.paper import PaperExecutor, OrderStatus\n\nlog = structlog.get_logger()\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Trade record for backtest results\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n@dataclass\nclass BacktestTrade:\n    pair: str\n    entry_time: datetime\n    entry_price: float\n    exit_time: datetime | None = None\n    exit_price: float | None = None\n    quantity: float = 0.0\n    pnl: float = 0.0\n    pnl_pct: float = 0.0\n    reason_entry: str = \"\"\n    reason_exit: str = \"\"\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Performance metrics\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n@dataclass\nclass PerformanceMetrics:\n    \"\"\"All the stats you'd want to see after a backtest.\"\"\"\n    total_return_pct: float = 0.0\n    total_pnl: float = 0.0\n    sharpe_ratio: float = 0.0\n    max_drawdown_pct: float = 0.0\n    win_rate: float = 0.0\n    total_trades: int = 0\n    winning_trades: int = 0\n    losing_trades: int = 0\n    avg_win_pct: float = 0.0\n    avg_loss_pct: float = 0.0\n    profit_factor: float = 0.0\n    best_trade_pct: float = 0.0\n    worst_trade_pct: float = 0.0\n    avg_holding_period: str = \"\"\n    start_date: str = \"\"\n    end_date: str = \"\"\n    starting_balance: float = 0.0\n    ending_balance: float = 0.0\n\n    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        return {k: v for k, v in self.__dict__.items()}\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Backtester\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\nclass Backtester:\n    \"\"\"\n    Runs a strategy against historical data and produces performance metrics.\n\n    Parameters\n    ----------\n    strategy : BaseStrategy\n        The strategy to test.\n    starting_balance : float\n        Simulated capital.\n    risk_cfg : RiskConfig\n        Risk management settings.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        strategy: BaseStrategy,\n        starting_balance: float = 10_000.0,\n        risk_cfg: RiskConfig | None = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        self.strategy = strategy\n        self.starting_balance = starting_balance\n        self.risk_cfg = risk_cfg or RiskConfig()\n\n    def run(self, pair: str, candles: pd.DataFrame) -> BacktestResult:\n        \"\"\"\n        Run the strategy on a full set of historical candles.\n\n        Parameters\n        ----------\n        pair : str\n            Trading pair, e.g. \"BTC/USDT\".\n        candles : pd.DataFrame\n            Full OHLCV history. Must have columns: open, high, low, close, volume.\n\n        Returns\n        -------\n        BacktestResult\n        \"\"\"\n        executor = PaperExecutor(self.starting_balance)\n        trades: list[BacktestTrade] = []\n        equity_curve: list[float] = []\n        open_trade: BacktestTrade | None = None\n\n        min_candles = self.strategy.required_history + 2\n        max_position_usd = self.starting_balance * (self.risk_cfg.max_position_pct / 100)\n\n        log.info(\n            \"backtest.start\",\n            strategy=self.strategy.name,\n            pair=pair,\n            candles=len(candles),\n            min_required=min_candles,\n        )\n\n        for i in range(min_candles, len(candles)):\n            window = candles.iloc[:i + 1]\n            price = float(candles[\"close\"].iloc[i])\n            timestamp = candles.index[i]\n\n            rec = self.strategy.evaluate(pair, window)\n\n            # --- BUY logic ---\n            if rec.signal == Signal.BUY and pair not in executor.positions:\n                spend = min(max_position_usd, executor.cash)\n                if spend >= 1.0:\n                    order = executor.buy(pair, spend, price, reason=rec.reason)\n                    if order.status == OrderStatus.FILLED:\n                        open_trade = BacktestTrade(\n                            pair=pair,\n                            entry_time=timestamp,\n                            entry_price=price,\n                            quantity=order.quantity,\n                            reason_entry=rec.reason,\n                        )\n\n            # --- SELL logic ---\n            elif rec.signal == Signal.SELL and pair in executor.positions:\n                pos = executor.positions[pair]\n                order = executor.sell(pair, price, reason=rec.reason)\n                if order.status == OrderStatus.FILLED and open_trade:\n                    open_trade.exit_time = timestamp\n                    open_trade.exit_price = price\n                    open_trade.pnl = (price - open_trade.entry_price) * open_trade.quantity\n                    open_trade.pnl_pct = ((price - open_trade.entry_price) / open_trade.entry_price) * 100\n                    open_trade.reason_exit = rec.reason\n                    trades.append(open_trade)\n                    open_trade = None\n\n            # --- Stop-loss / take-profit ---\n            if pair in executor.positions:\n                pos = executor.positions[pair]\n                pnl_pct = pos.unrealized_pnl_pct(price)\n\n                if pnl_pct <= -self.risk_cfg.stop_loss_pct:\n                    order = executor.sell(pair, price, reason=f\"Stop-loss at {pnl_pct:.1f}%\")\n                    if order.status == OrderStatus.FILLED and open_trade:\n                        open_trade.exit_time = timestamp\n                        open_trade.exit_price = price\n                        open_trade.pnl = (price - open_trade.entry_price) * open_trade.quantity\n                        open_trade.pnl_pct = pnl_pct\n                        open_trade.reason_exit = f\"Stop-loss at {pnl_pct:.1f}%\"\n                        trades.append(open_trade)\n                        open_trade = None\n\n                elif pnl_pct >= self.risk_cfg.take_profit_pct:\n                    order = executor.sell(pair, price, reason=f\"Take-profit at {pnl_pct:.1f}%\")\n                    if order.status == OrderStatus.FILLED and open_trade:\n                        open_trade.exit_time = timestamp\n                        open_trade.exit_price = price\n                        open_trade.pnl = (price - open_trade.entry_price) * open_trade.quantity\n                        open_trade.pnl_pct = pnl_pct\n                        open_trade.reason_exit = f\"Take-profit at {pnl_pct:.1f}%\"\n                        trades.append(open_trade)\n                        open_trade = None\n\n            # Track equity\n            total = executor.total_value({pair: price})\n            equity_curve.append(total)\n\n        # Close any remaining open position at last price\n        last_price = float(candles[\"close\"].iloc[-1])\n        if pair in executor.positions and open_trade:\n            executor.sell(pair, last_price, reason=\"Backtest ended \u2014 closing position\")\n            open_trade.exit_time = candles.index[-1]\n            open_trade.exit_price = last_price\n            open_trade.pnl = (last_price - open_trade.entry_price) * open_trade.quantity\n            open_trade.pnl_pct = ((last_price - open_trade.entry_price) / open_trade.entry_price) * 100\n            open_trade.reason_exit = \"Backtest ended\"\n            trades.append(open_trade)\n\n        final_value = executor.total_value({pair: last_price})\n        metrics = self._calculate_metrics(trades, equity_curve, final_value, candles)\n\n        log.info(\n            \"backtest.complete\",\n            strategy=self.strategy.name,\n            pair=pair,\n            trades=len(trades),\n            return_pct=metrics.total_return_pct,\n            sharpe=metrics.sharpe_ratio,\n            max_drawdown=metrics.max_drawdown_pct,\n        )\n\n        return BacktestResult(\n            strategy_name=self.strategy.name,\n            pair=pair,\n            metrics=metrics,\n            trades=trades,\n            equity_curve=equity_curve,\n            candles=candles,\n        )\n\n    def _calculate_metrics(\n        self,\n        trades: list[BacktestTrade],\n        equity_curve: list[float],\n        final_value: float,\n        candles: pd.DataFrame,\n    ) -> PerformanceMetrics:\n        \"\"\"Calculate all performance metrics from trade results.\"\"\"\n        m = PerformanceMetrics()\n        m.starting_balance = self.starting_balance\n        m.ending_balance = round(final_value, 2)\n        m.total_pnl = round(final_value - self.starting_balance, 2)\n        m.total_return_pct = round(((final_value - self.starting_balance) / self.starting_balance) * 100, 2)\n        m.total_trades = len(trades)\n        m.start_date = str(candles.index[0])[:10]\n        m.end_date = str(candles.index[-1])[:10]\n\n        if not trades:\n            return m\n\n        # Win/loss breakdown\n        wins = [t for t in trades if t.pnl > 0]\n        losses = [t for t in trades if t.pnl <= 0]\n        m.winning_trades = len(wins)\n        m.losing_trades = len(losses)\n        m.win_rate = round((len(wins) / len(trades)) * 100, 1)\n\n        if wins:\n            m.avg_win_pct = round(sum(t.pnl_pct for t in wins) / len(wins), 2)\n        if losses:\n            m.avg_loss_pct = round(sum(t.pnl_pct for t in losses) / len(losses), 2)\n\n        all_pnl_pcts = [t.pnl_pct for t in trades]\n        m.best_trade_pct = round(max(all_pnl_pcts), 2) if all_pnl_pcts else 0\n        m.worst_trade_pct = round(min(all_pnl_pcts), 2) if all_pnl_pcts else 0\n\n        # Profit factor\n        total_gains = sum(t.pnl for t in wins) if wins else 0\n        total_losses = abs(sum(t.pnl for t in losses)) if losses else 0\n        m.profit_factor = round(total_gains / total_losses, 2) if total_losses > 0 else float(\"inf\")\n\n        # Sharpe ratio (annualized, assuming hourly candles)\n        if len(equity_curve) > 1:\n            returns = pd.Series(equity_curve).pct_change().dropna()\n            if returns.std() > 0:\n                periods_per_year = 365 * 24  # hourly candles\n                m.sharpe_ratio = round(\n                    (returns.mean() / returns.std()) * math.sqrt(periods_per_year), 2\n                )\n\n        # Max drawdown\n        if equity_curve:\n            peak = equity_curve[0]\n            max_dd = 0.0\n            for val in equity_curve:\n                if val > peak:\n                    peak = val\n                dd = (peak - val) / peak * 100\n                if dd > max_dd:\n                    max_dd = dd\n            m.max_drawdown_pct = round(max_dd, 2)\n\n        # Average holding period\n        holding_hours = []\n        for t in trades:\n            if t.entry_time and t.exit_time:\n                delta = t.exit_time - t.entry_time\n                holding_hours.append(delta.total_seconds() / 3600)\n        if holding_hours:\n            avg_h = sum(holding_hours) / len(holding_hours)\n            if avg_h < 24:\n                m.avg_holding_period = f\"{avg_h:.1f} hours\"\n            else:\n                m.avg_holding_period = f\"{avg_h / 24:.1f} days\"\n\n        return m\n\n\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n# Result container\n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n@dataclass\nclass BacktestResult:\n    strategy_name: str\n    pair: str\n    metrics: PerformanceMetrics\n    trades: m = self.metrics\n        print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 60)\n        print(f\"  BACKTEST REPORT: {self.strategy_name.upper()} on {self.pair}\")\n        print(\"=\" * 60)\n        print(f\"  Period:           {m.start_date} \u2192 {m.end_date}\")\n        print(f\"  Starting Balance: ${m.starting_balance:,.2f}\")\n        print(f\"  Ending Balance:   ${m.ending_balance:,.2f}\")\n        print(f\"  Total Return:     {m.total_return_pct:+.2f}%  (${m.total_pnl:+,.2f})\")\n        print(\"-\" * 60)\n        print(f\"  Total Trades:     {m.total_trades}\")\n        print(f\"  Win Rate:         {m.win_rate}%  ({m.winning_trades}W / {m.losing_trades}L)\")\n        print(f\"  Avg Win:          {m.avg_win_pct:+.2f}%\")\n        print(f\"  Avg Loss:         {m.avg_loss_pct:+.2f}%\")\n        print(f\"  Best Trade:       {m.best_trade_pct:+.2f}%\")\n        print(f\"  Worst Trade:      {m.worst_trade_pct:+.2f}%\")\n        print(f\"  Profit Factor:    {m.profit_factor}\")\n        print(\"-\" * 60)\n        print(f\"  Sharpe Ratio:     {m.sharpe_ratio}\")\n        print(f\"  Max Drawdown:     {m.max_drawdown_pct:.2f}%\")\n        print(f\"  Avg Hold Time:    {m.avg_holding_period}\")\n        print(\"=\" * 60)\n\n        if self.trades:\n            print(\"\\n  Recent Trades:\")\n            for t in self.trades[-5:]:\n                emoji = \"\u2705\" if t.pnl > 0 else \"\u274c\"\n                print(\n                    f\"    {emoji} {str(t.entry_time)[:16]} \u2192 {str(t.exit_time)[:16]}\"\n                    f\"  ${t.entry_price:,.2f} \u2192 ${t.exit_price:,.2f}\"\n                    f\"  {t.pnl_pct:+.2f}%  (${t.pnl:+.2f})\"\n                )\n        print()\n\n    def to_json(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Export results as a JSON-serializable dict (for the dashboard).\"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"strategy\": self.strategy_name,\n            \"pair\": self.pair,\n            \"metrics\": self.metrics.to_dict(),\n            \"equity_curve\": [round(v, 2) for v in self.equity_curve],\n            \"trades\": [\n                {\n                    \"entry_time\": pair=pair,\\n            candles=len(candles),\\n            min_required=min_candles,\\n        )\\n\\n        for i in range(min_candles, len(candles)):\\n            window = candles.iloc[:i + 1]\\n            price = float(candles[\\\"close\\\"].iloc[i])\\n            timestamp = candles.index[i]\\n\\n            rec = self.strategy.evaluate(pair, window)\\n\\n            # --- BUY logic ---\\n            if rec.signal == Signal.BUY and pair not in executor.positions:\\n                spend = min(max_position_usd, executor.cash)\\n                if spend >= 1.0:\\n                    order = executor.buy(pair, spend, price, reason=rec.reason)\\n                    if order.status == OrderStatus.FILLED:\\n                        open_trade = BacktestTrade(\\n                            pair=pair,\\n                            entry_time=timestamp,\\n                            entry_price=price,\\n                            quantity=order.quantity,\\n                            reason_entry=rec.reason,\\n                        )\\n\\n            # --- SELL logic ---\\n            elif rec.signal == Signal.SELL and pair in executor.positions:\\n                pos = executor.positions[pair]\\n                order = executor.sell(pair, price, reason=rec.reason)\\n                if order.status == OrderStatus.FILLED and open_trade:\\n                    open_trade.exit_time = timestamp\\n                    open_trade.exit_price = price\\n                    open_trade.pnl = (price - open_trade.entry_price) * open_trade.quantity\\n                    open_trade.pnl_pct = ((price - open_trade.entry_price) / open_trade.entry_price) * 100\\n                    open_trade.reason_exit = rec.reason\\n                    trades.append(open_trade)\\n                    open_trade = None\\n\\n            # --- Stop-loss / take-profit ---\\n            if pair in executor.positions:\\n                pos = executor.positions[pair]\\n                pnl_pct = pos.unrealized_pnl_pct(price)\\n\\n                if pnl_pct <= -self.risk_cfg.stop_loss_pct:\\n                    order = executor.sell(pair, price, reason=f\\\"Stop-loss at {pnl_pct:.1f}%\\\")\\n                    if order.status == OrderStatus.FILLED and open_trade:\\n                        open_trade.exit_time = timestamp\\n                        open_trade.exit_price = price\\n                        open_trade.pnl = (price - open_trade.entry_price) * open_trade.quantity\\n                        open_trade.pnl_pct = pnl_pct\\n                        open_trade.reason_exit = f\\\"Stop-loss at {pnl_pct:.1f}%\\\"\\n                        trades.append(open_trade)\\n                        open_trade = None\\n\\n                elif pnl_pct >= self.risk_cfg.take_profit_pct:\\n                    order = executor.sell(pair, price, reason=f\\\"Take-profit at {pnl_pct:.1f}%\\\")\\n                    if order.status == OrderStatus.FILLED and open_trade:\\n                        open_trade.exit_time = timestamp\\n                        open_trade.exit_price = price\\n                        open_trade.pnl = (price - open_trade.entry_price) * open_trade.quantity\\n                        open_trade.pnl_pct = pnl_pct\\n                        open_trade.reason_exit = f\\\"Take-profit at {pnl_pct:.1f}%\\\"\\n                        trades.append(open_trade)\\n                        open_trade = None\\n\\n            # Track equity\\n            total = executor.total_value({pair: price})\\n            equity_curve.append(total)\\n\\n        # Close any remaining open position at last price\\n        last_price = float(candles[\\\"close\\\"].iloc[-1])\\n        if pair in executor.positions and max_drawdown=metrics.max_drawdown_pct,\\n        )\\n\\n        return BacktestResult(\\n            strategy_name=self.strategy.name,\\n            pair=pair,\\n            metrics=metrics,\\n )\\n\\n        # Max drawdown\\n        if equity_curve:\\n            peak = equity_curve[0]\\n            max_dd = 0.0\\n            for val in equity_curve:\\n                if val > peak:\\n Connect to exchange\n    feed = MarketDataFeed(cfg.exchange, cfg.trading)\n    feed.connect()\n\n    pair = args.pair or cfg.trading.pairs[0]\n    timeframe = args.timeframe or cfg.trading.default_timeframe\n    balance = args.balance or cfg.paper.starting_balance\n\n    # Calculate how many candles we need\n    timeframe_hours = {\"1m\": 1/60, \"5m\": 5/60, \"15m\": 0.25, \"1h\": 1, \"4h\": 4, \"1d\": 24}\n    hours_per_candle = timeframe_hours.get(timeframe, 1)\n    candles_needed = min(int((args.days * 24) / hours_per_candle), 720)  # most exchanges cap at 720\n\n    log.info(\"backtest.fetching_data\", pair=pair, timeframe=timeframe, candles=candles_needed)\n    candles = feed.fetch_candles(pair, timeframe=timeframe, limit=candles_needed)\n\n    if candles.empty or len(candles) < 50:\n        print(f\"\\n\u274c Not enough candle data: got {len(candles)}, need at least 50.\")\n        print(\"   Try a shorter timeframe (e.g. --timeframe 1h) or fewer days.\")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    print(f\"\\n\ud83d\udcca Loaded {len(candles)} candles for {pair} ({timeframe}) from {str(candles.index[0])[:10]} to {str(candles.index[-1])[:10]}\")\n\n    if args.compare:\n        # Run all strategies and compare\n        print(\"\\n\ud83d\udd04 Comparing all strategies...\\n\")\n        results = []\n        for name in STRATEGY_REGISTRY:\n            strat = load_strategy(name, cfg.strategy.params)\n            bt = Backtester(strat, starting_balance=balance, risk_cfg=cfg.risk)\n            result = bt.run(pair, candles)\n            result.print_report()\n            results.append(result)\n\n        # Print comparison table\n        print(\"\\n\" + \"=\" * 80)\n        print(\"  STRATEGY COMPARISON\")\n        print(\"=\" * 80)\n        print(f\"  {'Strategy':<20} {'Return':>10} {'Trades':>8} {'Win Rate':>10} {'Sharpe':>8} {'Max DD':>10}\")\n        print(\"-\" * 80)\n        for r in sorted(results, key=lambda x: x.metrics.total_return_pct, reverse=True):\n            m = r.metrics\n            print(\n                f\"  {r.strategy_name:<20} {m.total_return_pct:>+9.2f}% {m.total_trades:>8} \"\n                f\"{m.win_rate:>9.1f}% {m.sharpe_ratio:>8.2f} {m.max_drawdown_pct:>9.2f}%\"\n            )\n        print(\"=\" * 80 + \"\\n\")\n\n        if args.save_json:\n            _save_results([r.to_json() for r in results])\n\n    else:\n        # Run single strategy\n        strategy_name = args.strategy or cfg.strategy.name\n        strategy = load_strategy(strategy_name, cfg.strategy.params)\n\n        bt = Backtester(strategy, starting_balance=balance, risk_cfg=cfg.risk)\n        result = bt.run(pair, candles)\n        result.print_report()\n\n        if args.save_json:\n            _save_results([result.to_json()])\n\n\ndef _save_results(data: list[dict]) -> None:\n    out_path = PROJECT_ROOT / \"data\" / \"backtest_results.json\"\n    out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n    with open(out_path, \"w\") as f:\n        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, default=str)\n    print(f\"\ud83d\udcbe Results saved to {out_path}\")\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n",

      "file_text": "\"\"\"Tests for RSI, MACD, and Bollinger Bands strategies.\"\"\"\n\nimport pandas as pd\n\nfrom agent.strategies.base import Signal\nfrom agent.strategies.rsi import RSIStrategy\nfrom agent.strategies.macd import MACDStrategy\nfrom agent.strategies.bollinger_bands import BollingerBandsStrategy\nfrom agent.strategies.loader import load_strategy\n\n\ndef _make_candles(prices: list[float]) -> pd.DataFrame:\n    n = len(prices)\n    return pd.DataFrame(\n        {\n            \"open\": prices,\n            \"high\": [p * 1.01 for p in prices],\n            \"low\": [p * 0.99 for p in prices],\n            \"close\": prices,\n            \"volume\": [1000.0] * n,\n        },\n        index=pd.date_range(\"2025-01-01\", periods=n, freq=\"h\", tz=\"UTC\"),\n    )\n\n\n# --- RSI Tests ---\n\ndef test_rsi_oversold_buy():\n    \"\"\"RSI dropping below 30 should trigger BUY.\"\"\"\n    strategy = RSIStrategy(params={\"period\": 14, \"oversold\": 30, \"overbought\": 70})\n    # Steady decline to push RSI into oversold territory\n    prices = [100 - i * 0.8 for i in range(30)]  # 100 \u2192 ~76, consistent drops\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\"BTC/USDT\", candles)\n    # With consistent drops, RSI should be very low \u2192 BUY\n    assert result.signal == Signal.BUY\n    assert result.metadata[\"rsi\"] < 35\n\n\ndef test_rsi_overbought_sell():\n    \"\"\"RSI rising above 70 should trigger SELL.\"\"\"\n    strategy = RSIStrategy(params={\"period\": 14, \"oversold\": 30, \"overbought\": 70})\n    # Steady rise to push RSI into overbought\n    prices = [100 + i * 0.8 for i in range(30)]  # consistent gains\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\"BTC/USDT\", candles)\n    assert result.signal == Signal.SELL\n    assert result.metadata[\"rsi\"] > 65\n\n\ndef test_rsi_neutral_hold():\n    \"\"\"Flat prices should keep RSI neutral \u2192 HOLD.\"\"\"\n    strategy = RSIStrategy(params={\"period\": 14})\n    prices = [100.0 + (i % 2) * 0.1 for i in range(30)]  # tiny oscillation\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\"BTC/USDT\", candles)\n    assert result.signal == Signal.HOLD\n\n\n# --- MACD Tests ---\n\ndef test_macd_hold_on_flat():\n    \"\"\"Flat data \u2192 no crossover \u2192 HOLD.\"\"\"\n    strategy = MACDStrategy(params={\"fast_period\": 12, \"slow_period\": 26, \"signal_period\": 9})\n    prices = [100.0] * 50\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\"BTC/USDT\", candles)\n    assert result.signal == Signal.HOLD\n\n\ndef test_macd_insufficient_data():\n    \"\"\"Not enough candles \u2192 HOLD.\"\"\"\n    strategy = MACDStrategy(params={\"fast_period\": 12, \"slow_period\": 26, \"signal_period\": 9})\n    prices = [100.0] * 10\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\"BTC/USDT\", candles)\n    assert result.signal == Signal.HOLD\n    assert \"not enough\" in result.reason.lower()\n\n\n# --- Bollinger Bands Tests ---\n\ndef test_bollinger_below_lower_band_buy():\n    \"\"\"Price below lower band \u2192 BUY.\"\"\"\n    strategy = BollingerBandsStrategy(params={\"period\": 20, \"std_dev\": 2.0})\n    # Stable, then sharp drop on last candle\n    prices = [100.0] * 25 + [80.0]  # big drop pushes below lower band\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\"BTC/USDT\", candles)\n    assert result.signal == Signal.BUY\n\n\ndef test_bollinger_above_upper_band_sell():\n    \"\"\"Price above upper band \u2192 SELL.\"\"\"\n    strategy = BollingerBandsStrategy(params={\"period\": 20, \"std_dev\": 2.0})\n    # Stable, then sharp spike\n    prices = [100.0] * 25 + [120.0]  # big spike pushes above upper band\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\"BTC/USDT\", candles)\n    assert result.signal == Signal.SELL\n\n\ndef test_bollinger_within_bands_hold():\n    \"\"\"Price within bands \u2192 HOLD.\"\"\"\n    strategy = BollingerBandsStrategy(params={\"period\": 20, \"std_dev\": 2.0})\n    prices = [100.0] * 30\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\"BTC/USDT\", candles)\n    assert result.signal == Signal.HOLD\n\n\n# --- Strategy Loader Tests ---\n\ndef test_loader_finds_all_strategies():\n    \"\"\"All four strategies should be loadable by name.\"\"\"\n    for name in [\"sma_crossover\", \"rsi\", \"macd\", \"bollinger_bands\"]:\n        strategy = load_strategy(name, {})\n        assert strategy.name == name\n",

Stable, then sharp spike\\n    prices = [100.0] * 25 + [120.0]  # big spike pushes above upper band\\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\\\"BTC/USDT\\\", candles)\\n    assert result.signal == Signal.SELL\\n\\n\\ndef test_bollinger_within_bands_hold():\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Price within bands \\u2192 HOLD.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    strategy = BollingerBandsStrategy(params={\\\"period\\\": 20, \\\"std_dev\\\": 2.0})\\n    prices = [100.0] * 30\\n    candles = _make_candles(prices)\\n    result = strategy.evaluate(\\\"BTC/USDT\\\", candles)\\n    assert result.signal == Signal.HOLD\\n\\n\\n# --- Strategy Loader Tests ---\\n\\ndef test_loader_finds_all_strategies():\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"All four strategies should be loadable by name.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    for name in [\\\"sma_crossover\\\", \\\"rsi\\\", \\\"macd\\\", \\\"bollinger_bands\\\"]:\\n        strategy = load_strategy(name, {})\\n        assert strategy.name == name\\n\", \"filename\": \"/home/claude/crypto-trading-agent/tests/test_new_strategies.py\"}"

      "file_text": "\"\"\"\nDashboard Generator \u2014 creates a standalone HTML dashboard from backtest results.\n\nUsage:\n    python -m agent.run_backtest --compare --save-json\n    python -m agent.dashboard\n\nOpens a beautiful dashboard in your browser showing equity curves,\ntrade history, and strategy comparisons.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport sys\nimport webbrowser\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nimport structlog\n\nfrom agent.config import PROJECT_ROOT\n\nlog = structlog.get_logger()\n\n\ndef generate_dashboard(results_path: Path | None = None) -> Path:\n    \"\"\"\n    Generate an HTML dashboard from saved backtest results.\n\n    Parameters\n    ----------\n    results_path : Path, optional\n        Path to backtest_results.json. Defaults to data/backtest_results.json.\n\n    Returns\n    -------\n    Path\n        Path to the generated HTML file.\n    \"\"\"\n    results_path = results_path or PROJECT_ROOT / \"data\" / \"backtest_results.json\"\n\n    if not results_path.exists():\n        print(\"\u274c No backtest results found.\")\n        print(\"   Run a backtest first:\")\n        print(\"   python -m agent.run_backtest --compare --save-json\")\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    with open(results_path) as f:\n        results = json.load(f)\n\n    html = _build_html(results)\n\n    output_path = PROJECT_ROOT / \"data\" / \"dashboard.html\"\n    with open(output_path, \"w\") as f:\n        f.write(html)\n\n    return output_path\n\n\ndef _build_html(results: list[dict]) -> str:\n    \"\"\"Build the full HTML dashboard.\"\"\"\n    results_json = json.dumps(results, indent=2)\n\n    return f\"\"\"<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n<title>Crypto Trading Agent \u2014 Backtest Dashboard</title>\n<script src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.1/dist/chart.umd.min.js\"></script>\n<style>\n  * {{ margin: 0; color: #8b949e; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }}\n  .card-value {{ font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 4px; }}\n  .positive {{ color: #3fb950; }}\n  .negative {{ color: #f85149; }}\n  .neutral {{ color: #58a6ff; }}\n  .section {{ margin-bottom: 40px; }}\n  .section h2 {{ font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: #c9d1d9; }}\n  .chart-container {{\n    background: #161b22;\n    border: 1px solid #30363d;\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    padding: 24px;\n    margin-bottom: 24px;\n  }}\n  canvas {{ max-height: 400px; }}\n  table {{\n    width: 100%;\n    border-collapse: collapse;\n    font-size: 13px;\n  }}\n  th {{\n    text-align: left;\n    padding: 10px 12px;\n    border-bottom: 2px solid #30363d;\n    color: #8b949e;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    font-size: 11px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n  }}\n  td {{\n    padding: 10px 12px;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #21262d;\n  }}\n  tr:hover {{ background: #1c2128; }}\n  .badge {{\n    display: inline-block;\n    padding: 2px 8px;\n    border-radius: 6px;\n    font-size: 11px;\n    font-weight: 600;\n  }}\n  .badge-win {{ background: rgba(63,185,80,0.15); color: #3fb950; }}\n  .badge-loss {{ background: rgba(248,81,73,0.15); color: #f85149; }}\n  .strategy-tabs {{\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 8px;\n    margin-bottom: 24px;\n    flex-wrap: wrap;\n  }}\n  .tab {{\n    padding: 8px 16px;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    border: 1px solid #30363d;\n    background: #161b22;\n    color: #c9d1d9;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    font-size: 13px;\n    transition: all 0.2s;\n  }}\n  .tab:hover {{ border-color: #58a6ff; }}\n  .tab.active {{ background: #58a6ff; color: #0f1117; border-color: #58a6ff; font-weight: 600; }}\n  .comparison-row {{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }}\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<h1>Crypto Trading Agent</h1>\n<p class=\"subtitle\">Backtest Dashboard \u2014 Paper Trading Performance</p>\n\n<div id=\"app\"></div>\n\n<script>\nconst results = {results_json};\n\nfunction render() {{\n  const app = document.getElementById('app');\n\n  if (!results || results.length === 0) {{\n    app.innerHTML = '<p>No backtest results to display.</p>';\n    return;\n  }}\n\n  // Strategy tabs\n  let html = '<div class=\"strategy-tabs\">';\n  results.forEach((r, i) => {{\n    html += `<div class=\"tab ${{i === 0 ? 'active' : ''}}\" onclick=\"switchTab(${{i}})\">${{r.strategy}}</div>`;\n  }});\n  html += '</div>';\n\n  // Comparison cards (if multiple strategies)\n  if (results.length > 1) {{\n    html += '<div class=\"section\"><h2>Strategy Comparison</h2><div class=\"comparison-row\">';\n    const sorted = [...results].sort((a, b) => b.metrics.total_return_pct - a.metrics.total_return_pct);\n    sorted.forEach(r => {{\n      const m = r.metrics;\n      const retClass = m.total_return_pct >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative';\n      html += `\n        <div class=\"card\">\n          <div class=\"card-label\">${{r.strategy}}</div>\n          <div class=\"card-value ${{retClass}}\">${{m.total_return_pct >= 0 ? '+' : ''}}${{m.total_return_pct}}%</div>\n          <div style=\"margin-top:8px;font-size:12px;color:#8b949e\">\n            ${{m.total_trades}} trades \u00b7 ${{m.win_rate}}% win rate \u00b7 Sharpe ${{m.sharpe_ratio}}\n          </div>\n        </div>`;\n    }});\n    html += '</div></div>';\n  }}\n\n  // Per-strategy detail panels\n  results.forEach((r, i) => {{\n    html += `<div id=\"panel-${{i}}\" style=\"display: ${{i === 0 ? 'block' : 'none'}}\">`;\n    html += renderStrategy(r, i);\n    html += '</div>';\n  }});\n\n  app.innerHTML = html;\n\n  // Render charts\n  results.forEach((r, i) => {{\n    if (r.equity_curve && r.equity_curve.length > 0) {{\n      renderEquityChart(r, i);\n    }}\n  }});\n}}\n\nfunction renderStrategy(r, idx) {{\n  const m = r.metrics;\n  const retClass = m.total_return_pct >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative';\n\n  let html = `\n    <div class=\"section\">\n      <h2>${{r.strategy.toUpperCase()}} on ${{r.pair}}</h2>\n      <div class=\"grid\">\n        <div class=\"card\">\n          <div class=\"card-label\">Total Return</div>\n          <div class=\"card-value ${{retClass}}\">${{m.total_return_pct >= 0 ? '+' : ''}}${{m.total_return_pct}}%</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"card\">\n          <div class=\"card-label\">P&L</div>\n          <div class=\"card-value ${{retClass}}\">$${{m.total_pnl.toLocaleString()}}</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"card\">\n          <div class=\"card-label\">Win Rate</div>\n          <div class=\"card-value neutral\">${{m.win_rate}}%</div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"card\">\n          <div class=\"card-label\">Sharpe Ratio</div>\n          <div class=\"card-value ${{m.sharpe_ratio >= 1 ? 'positive' : m.sharpe_ratio < 0 ? '+' : ''}}${{t.pnl_pct.toFixed(2)}}%</span></td>\n                  <td style=\"font-size:11px;color:#8b949e;max-width:200px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis\">${{t.reason_exit}}</td>\n                </tr>`;\n    }});\n\n    html += '</tbody></table></div></div></div>';\n  }}\n\n  return html;\n}}\n\nfunction renderEquityChart(r, idx) {{\n  const canvas = document.getElementById(`equity-chart-${{idx}}`);\n  if (!canvas) return;\n\n  const labels = r.equity_curve.map((_, i) => i);\n  const startVal = r.equity_curve[0] || 10000;\n\n  new Chart(canvas, {{\n    type: 'line',\n    data: {{\n      labels: labels,\n      datasets: [\n        {{\n          label: 'Portfolio Value ($)',\n          data: r.equity_curve,\n          borderColor: r.metrics.total_return_pct >= 0 ? 'rgba(63,185,80,0.1)'\n            : 'rgba(248,81,73,0.1)',\n          fill: true,\n          tension: 0.3,\n          pointRadius: 0,\n          borderWidth: 2,\n        }},\n        {{\n          label: 'Starting Balance',\n          data: labels.map(() => startVal),\n          borderColor: '#30363d',\n          borderDash: [5, 5],\n          pointRadius: 0,\n          borderWidth: 1,\n        }}\n      ]\n    }},\n    options: {{\n      responsive: true,\n      interaction: {{ mode: 'index', intersect: false }},\n      plugins: {{\n        legend: {{ labels: {{ color: '#8b949e' }} }},\n        tooltip: {{\n          backgroundColor: '#161b22',\n          borderColor: '#30363d',\n          borderWidth: 1,\n          titleColor: '#c9d1d9',\n          bodyColor: '#e1e4e8',\n          callbacks: {{\n            label: ctx => `$${{ctx.parsed.y.toLocaleString(undefined, {{minimumFractionDigits: 2}})}}`\n          }}\n        }}\n      }},\n      scales: {{\n        x: {{\n          display: false,\n        }},\n        y: {{\n          ticks: {{ color: '#8b949e', callback: v => '$' + v.toLocaleString() }},\n          grid: {{ color: '#21262d' }},\n        }}\n      }}\n    }}\n  }});\n}}\n\nfunction switchTab(idx) {{\n  document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach((t, i) => {{\n    t.classList.toggle('active', i === idx);\n  }});\n  results.forEach((_, i) => {{\n    const panel = document.getElementById(`panel-${{i}}`);\n    if (panel) panel.style.display = i === idx ? If something is wrong, the agent will fail fast with a clear error message rather than silently misbehaving.\n\n---\n\n## Available Strategies\n\n| Strategy | Config Name | Description |\n|---|---|---|\n| **SMA Crossover** | `sma_crossover` | Buys when fast SMA crosses above slow SMA. Classic trend-following. |\n| **RSI** | `rsi` | Buys when RSI < 30 (oversold), sells when RSI > 70 (overbought). Mean-reversion. |\n| **MACD** | `macd` | Buys on MACD/signal bullish crossover, sells on bearish crossover. Momentum. |\n| **Bollinger Bands** | `bollinger_bands` | Buys when price breaks below lower band, sells above upper band. Volatility-based. |\n\nTo switch strategies, edit `configs/config.default.yaml` and change `strategy.name`.\n\n---\n\n## Backtesting\n\nRun any strategy against historical data to see how it would have performed:\n\n```bash\n# Backtest default strategy (SMA Crossover) on BTC/USDT\npython -m agent.run_backtest\n\n# Backtest RSI strategy with 60 days of data\npython -m agent.run_backtest --strategy rsi --days 60\n\n# Compare ALL strategies side-by-side and save results\npython -m agent.run_backtest --compare --save-json\n\n# Open the visual dashboard in your browser\npython -m agent.dashboard\n```\n\nThe dashboard shows equity curves, trade history, win rates, Sharpe ratios, and more.",

Check stop-loss / take-profit on open positions\\n  3. Run the strategy on each pair\\n  4. Execute any BUY/SELL signals through the portfolio manager\\n  5. Log the portfolio summary\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\n\\nimport time\\n\\nimport structlog\\n\\nfrom agent.config import AgentConfig\\nfrom agent.strategies.base import Signal, BaseStrategy\\nfrom agent.strategies.loader import load_strategy\\nfrom market_data.feed import MarketDataFeed\\nfrom execution.paper import PaperExecutor\\nfrom portfolio.manager import PortfolioManager\\n\\nlog = structlog.get_logger()\\n\\n\\nclass AgentLoop:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    Wires all components together and runs the trading loop.\\n\\n    Parameters\\n    ----------\\n    cfg : AgentConfig\\n        The full, validated agent configuration.\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\n    def __init__(self, cfg: AgentConfig) -> None:\\n        self.cfg = cfg\\n        self.tick_count: int = 0\\n\\n        # Build components\\n        self.feed = MarketDataFeed(cfg.exchange, cfg.trading)\\n        self.strategy: BaseStrategy = load_strategy(cfg.strategy.name, cfg.strategy.params)\\n        self.executor = PaperExecutor(cfg.paper.starting_balance)\\n        self.portfolio = PortfolioManager(cfg.risk, self.executor)\\n\\n    def start(self) -> None:\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"Connect to the exchange and begin the loop.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        log.info(\\n            \\\"agent_loop.starting\\\",\\n            strategy=self.strategy.name,\\n            pairs=self.cfg.trading.pairs,\\n            interval_s=self.cfg.scheduler.strategy_interval_seconds,\\n            mode=self.cfg.mode,\\n        )\\n\\n        self.feed.connect()\\n\\n        log.info(\\\"agent_loop.running\\\", msg=\\\"Agent is live. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\\\")\\n\\n        try:\\n            while True:\\n                self._tick()\\n                time.sleep(self.cfg.scheduler.strategy_interval_seconds)\\n        except KeyboardInterrupt:\\n            log.info(\\\"agent_loop.stopped\\\", msg=\\\"Shutdown by user (Ctrl+C)\\\")\\n            self._print_final_summary()\\n\\n    def _tick(self) -> None:\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"Execute one cycle of the trading loop.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        self.tick_count += 1\\n        log.info(\\\"agent_loop.tick\\\", tick=self.tick_count)\\n\\n        # Step 1: Fetch current prices for risk checks\\n        current_prices = self.feed.get_all_prices()\\n        if not current_prices:\\n            log.warning(\\\"agent_loop.no_prices\\\", msg=\\\"Could not fetch prices, skipping tick\\\")\\n            return\\n\\n        # Step 2: Check stop-loss / take-profit on open positions\\n        closed = self.portfolio.check_stop_loss_take_profit(current_prices)\\n        if closed:\\n            log.info(\\\"agent_loop.auto_closed\\\", pairs=closed)\\n\\n        # Step 3: Fetch candles and run strategy on each pair\\n        all_candles = self.feed.fetch_all_pairs(limit=self.strategy.required_history + 10)\\n\\n        for pair, candles in all_candles.items():\\n            if candles.empty:\\n                continue\\n\\n            # Run the strategy\\n            recommendation = self.strategy.evaluate(pair, candles)\\n\\n            log.info(\\n                \\\"agent_loop.signal\\\",\\n                pair=pair,\\n                signal=recommendation.signal.value,\\n                confidence=recommendation.confidence,\\n                reason=recommendation.reason,\\n            )\\n\\n            # Step 4: Execute signals through the portfolio manager\\n            if recommendation.signal == Signal.BUY:\\n                price = current_prices.get(pair, 0)\\n                if price > 0:\\n                    self.portfolio.try_buy(\\n                        pair=pair,\\n                        price=price,\\n                        current_prices=current_prices,\\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\\n                    )\\n\\n            elif recommendation.signal == Signal.SELL:\\n                price = current_prices.get(pair, 0)\\n                if price > 0:\\n                    self.portfolio.try_sell(\\n                        pair=pair,\\n                        price=price,\\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\\n                    )\\n\\n        # Step 5: Log portfolio summary\\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\\n        log.info(\\n            \\\"agent_loop.portfolio\\\",\\n            cash=summary[\\\"cash\\\"],\\n            total_value=summary[\\\"total_value\\\"],\\n            pnl=summary[\\\"total_pnl\\\"],\\n            pnl_pct=summary[\\\"total_pnl_pct\\\"],\\n            open_positions=summary[\\\"open_positions\\\"],\\n            total_trades=summary[\\\"total_trades\\\"],\\n        )\\n\\n    def _print_final_summary(self) -> None:\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"Print a final report when the agent shuts down.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        current_prices = self.feed.get_all_prices()\\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\\n\\n        log.info(\\\"=\\\" * 60)\\n        log.info(\\\"agent_loop.final_report\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Total ticks:      {self.tick_count}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Total trades:     {summary['total_trades']}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Starting balance: ${self.executor.starting_balance:,.2f}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Final value:      ${summary['total_value']:,.2f}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  P&L:              ${summary['total_pnl']:,.2f} ({summary['total_pnl_pct']:.2f}%)\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Cash remaining:   ${summary['cash']:,.2f}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Open positions:   {summary['open_positions']}\\\")\\n        log.info(\\\"=\\\" * 60)\\n\", \"filename\": \"/home/claude/crypto-trading-agent/src/agent/loop.py\"}"

      "file_text": "\"\"\"\nShared State Store \u2014 thread-safe state that bridges the agent loop and the dashboard.\n\nThe agent loop writes state after every tick. The dashboard web server\nreads it to serve real-time data to the browser.\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport threading\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom typing import Any\n\n\nclass StateStore:\n    \"\"\"\n    Thread-safe container for the agent's current state.\n\n    The agent loop calls `update()` after each tick.\n    The web server calls `snapshot()` to read the latest state.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._lock = threading.Lock()\n        self._state: dict[str, Any] = {\n            \"status\": \"starting\",\n            \"tick\": 0,\n            \"last_updated\": None,\n            \"mode\": \"paper\",\n            \"exchange\": \"\",\n            \"strategy\": \"\",\n            \"timeframe\": \"\",\n            \"pairs\": [],\n            \"prices\": {},\n            \"portfolio\": {\n                \"cash\": 0,\n                \"total_value\": 0,\n                \"total_pnl\": 0,\n                \"total_pnl_pct\": 0,\n                \"open_positions\": 0,\n                \"total_trades\": 0,\n                \"positions\": {},\n            },\n            \"signals\": [],       # Recent signals from the strategy\n            \"trade_log\": [],     # All executed trades\n            \"equity_curve\": [],  # Portfolio value over time\n        }\n\n    def update(self, **kwargs: Any) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Update state fields (thread-safe).\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            for key, value in kwargs.items():\n                self._state[key] = value\n            self._state[\"last_updated\"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()\n\n    def add_signal(self, signal: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Append a strategy signal to the log (keeps last 100).\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            self._state[\"signals\"].append(signal)\n            self._state[\"signals\"] = self._state[\"signals\"][-100:]\n\n    def add_trade(self, trade: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Append an executed trade to the log.\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            self._state[\"trade_log\"].append(trade)\n\n    def add_equity_point(self, value: float) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Append a portfolio value snapshot (keeps last 1000).\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            self._state[\"equity_curve\"].append({\n                \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                \"value\": round(value, 2),\n            })\n            self._state[\"equity_curve\"] = self._state[\"equity_curve\"][-1000:]\n\n    def snapshot(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Return a copy of the full state (thread-safe).\"\"\"\n        with self._lock:\n            import copy\n            return copy.deepcopy(self._state)\n\n\n# Global singleton \u2014 shared between agent thread and web server thread\nstore = StateStore()\n",

      "description": "Create the updated agent loop that writes state to the store for the live dashboard",
      "file_text": "\"\"\"\nAgent Loop \u2014 the main orchestrator.\n\nOn each tick:\n  1. Fetch fresh candle data\n  2. Check stop-loss / take-profit on open positions\n  3. Run the strategy on each pair\n  4. Execute any BUY/SELL signals through the portfolio manager\n  5. Update shared state for the live dashboard\n  6. Log the portfolio summary\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport time\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\n\nimport structlog\n\nfrom agent.config import AgentConfig\nfrom agent.strategies.base import Signal, BaseStrategy\nfrom agent.strategies.loader import load_strategy\nfrom agent.state import store\nfrom market_data.feed import MarketDataFeed\nfrom execution.paper import PaperExecutor, OrderStatus\nfrom portfolio.manager import PortfolioManager\n\nlog = structlog.get_logger()\n\n\nclass AgentLoop:\n    \"\"\"\n    Wires all components together and runs the trading loop.\n\n    Parameters\n    ----------\n    cfg : AgentConfig\n        The full, validated agent configuration.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, cfg: AgentConfig) -> None:\n        self.cfg = cfg\n        self.tick_count: int = 0\n\n        # Build components\n        self.feed = MarketDataFeed(cfg.exchange, cfg.trading)\n        self.strategy: BaseStrategy = load_strategy(cfg.strategy.name, cfg.strategy.params)\n        self.executor = PaperExecutor(cfg.paper.starting_balance)\n        self.portfolio = PortfolioManager(cfg.risk, self.executor)\n\n        # Initialize shared state\n        store.update(\n            status=\"initializing\",\n            mode=cfg.mode,\n            exchange=cfg.exchange.name,\n            strategy=cfg.strategy.name,\n            timeframe=cfg.trading.default_timeframe,\n            pairs=cfg.trading.pairs,\n        )\n\n    def start(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Connect to the exchange and begin the loop.\"\"\"\n        log.info(\n            \"agent_loop.starting\",\n            strategy=self.strategy.name,\n            pairs=self.cfg.trading.pairs,\n            interval_s=self.cfg.scheduler.strategy_interval_seconds,\n            mode=self.cfg.mode,\n        )\n\n        self.feed.connect()\n        store.update(status=\"running\")\n\n        log.info(\"agent_loop.running\", msg=\"Agent is live. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\")\n\n        try:\n            while True:\n                self._tick()\n                time.sleep(self.cfg.scheduler.strategy_interval_seconds)\n        except KeyboardInterrupt:\n            store.update(status=\"stopped\")\n            log.info(\"agent_loop.stopped\", msg=\"Shutdown by user (Ctrl+C)\")\n            self._print_final_summary()\n\n    def _tick(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Execute one cycle of the trading loop.\"\"\"\n        self.tick_count += 1\n        log.info(\"agent_loop.tick\", tick=self.tick_count)\n\n        # Step 1: Fetch current prices for risk checks\n        current_prices = self.feed.get_all_prices()\n        if not current_prices:\n            log.warning(\"agent_loop.no_prices\", msg=\"Could not fetch prices, skipping tick\")\n            return\n\n        store.update(prices=current_prices, tick=self.tick_count)\n\n        # Step 2: Check stop-loss / take-profit on open positions\n        closed = self.portfolio.check_stop_loss_take_profit(current_prices)\n        if closed:\n            log.info(\"agent_loop.auto_closed\", pairs=closed)\n            for pair in closed:\n                # Log the auto-close trade\n                last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1] if self.executor.order_history else None\n                if last_order:\n                    store.add_trade({\n                        \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                        \"pair\": pair,\n                        \"side\": \"SELL\",\n                        \"price\": last_order.price,\n                        \"cost\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\n                        \"reason\": last_order.reason,\n                        \"status\": \"FILLED\",\n                    })\n\n        # Step 3: Fetch candles and run strategy on each pair\n        all_candles = self.feed.fetch_all_pairs(limit=self.strategy.required_history + 10)\n\n        for pair, candles in all_candles.items():\n            if candles.empty:\n                continue\n\n            # Run the strategy\n            recommendation = self.strategy.evaluate(pair, candles)\n\n            log.info(\n                \"agent_loop.signal\",\n                pair=pair,\n                signal=recommendation.signal.value,\n                confidence=recommendation.confidence,\n                reason=recommendation.reason,\n            )\n\n            # Log signal to shared state\n            store.add_signal({\n                \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                \"pair\": pair,\n                \"signal\": recommendation.signal.value,\n                \"confidence\": recommendation.confidence,\n                \"reason\": recommendation.reason,\n                \"metadata\": recommendation.metadata,\n            })\n\n            # Step 4: Execute signals through the portfolio manager\n            if recommendation.signal == Signal.BUY:\n                price = current_prices.get(pair, 0)\n                if price > 0:\n                    filled = self.portfolio.try_buy(\n                        pair=pair,\n                        price=price,\n                        current_prices=current_prices,\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\n                    )\n                    if filled:\n                        last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1]\n                        store.add_trade({\n                            \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                            \"pair\": pair,\n                            \"side\": \"BUY\",\n                            \"price\": price,\n                            \"quantity\": round(last_order.quantity, 8),\n                            \"cost\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\n                            \"reason\": recommendation.reason,\n                            \"status\": \"FILLED\",\n                        })\n\n            elif recommendation.signal == Signal.SELL:\n                price = current_prices.get(pair, 0)\n                if price > 0:\n                    filled = self.portfolio.try_sell(\n                        pair=pair,\n                        price=price,\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\n                    )\n                    if filled:\n                        last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1]\n                        store.add_trade({\n                            \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                            \"pair\": pair,\n                            \"side\": \"SELL\",\n                            \"price\": price,\n                            \"quantity\": round(last_order.quantity, 8),\n                            \"cost\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\n                            \"reason\": recommendation.reason,\n                            \"status\": \"FILLED\",\n                        })\n\n        # Step 5: Update shared state with portfolio snapshot\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\n        store.update(portfolio=summary)\n        store.add_equity_point(summary[\"total_value\"])\n\n        log.info(\n            \"agent_loop.portfolio\",\n            cash=summary[\"cash\"],\n            total_value=summary[\"total_value\"],\n            pnl=summary[\"total_pnl\"],\n            pnl_pct=summary[\"total_pnl_pct\"],\n            open_positions=summary[\"open_positions\"],\n            total_trades=summary[\"total_trades\"],\n        )\n\n    def _print_final_summary(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Print a final report when the agent shuts down.\"\"\"\n        current_prices = self.feed.get_all_prices()\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\n\n        log.info(\"=\" * 60)\n        log.info(\"agent_loop.final_report\")\n        log.info(f\"  Total ticks:      {self.tick_count}\")\n        log.info(f\"  Total trades:     {summary['total_trades']}\")\n        log.info(f\"  Starting balance: ${self.executor.starting_balance:,.2f}\")\n        log.info(f\"  Final value:      ${summary['total_value']:,.2f}\")\n        log.info(f\"  P&L:              ${summary['total_pnl']:,.2f} ({summary['total_pnl_pct']:.2f}%)\")\n        log.info(f\"  Cash remaining:   ${summary['cash']:,.2f}\")\n        log.info(f\"  Open positions:   {summary['open_positions']}\")\n        log.info(\"=\" * 60)\n",

Build components\\n        self.feed = MarketDataFeed(cfg.exchange, cfg.trading)\\n        self.strategy: BaseStrategy = load_strategy(cfg.strategy.name, cfg.strategy.params)\\n        self.executor = PaperExecutor(cfg.paper.starting_balance)\\n        self.portfolio = PortfolioManager(cfg.risk, self.executor)\\n\\n        # Initialize shared state\\n        store.update(\\n            status=\\\"initializing\\\",\\n            mode=cfg.mode,\\n            exchange=cfg.exchange.name,\\n            strategy=cfg.strategy.name,\\n            timeframe=cfg.trading.default_timeframe,\\n            pairs=cfg.trading.pairs,\\n        )\\n\\n    def start(self) -> None:\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"Connect to the exchange and begin the loop.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        log.info(\\n            \\\"agent_loop.starting\\\",\\n            strategy=self.strategy.name,\\n            pairs=self.cfg.trading.pairs,\\n            interval_s=self.cfg.scheduler.strategy_interval_seconds,\\n            mode=self.cfg.mode,\\n        )\\n\\n        self.feed.connect()\\n        store.update(status=\\\"running\\\")\\n\\n        log.info(\\\"agent_loop.running\\\", msg=\\\"Agent is live. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\\\")\\n\\n        try:\\n            while True:\\n                self._tick()\\n                time.sleep(self.cfg.scheduler.strategy_interval_seconds)\\n        except KeyboardInterrupt:\\n            store.update(status=\\\"stopped\\\")\\n            log.info(\\\"agent_loop.stopped\\\", msg=\\\"Shutdown by user (Ctrl+C)\\\")\\n            self._print_final_summary()\\n\\n    def _tick(self) -> None:\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"Execute one cycle of the trading loop.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        self.tick_count += 1\\n        log.info(\\\"agent_loop.tick\\\", tick=self.tick_count)\\n\\n        # Step 1: Fetch current prices for risk checks\\n        current_prices = self.feed.get_all_prices()\\n        if not current_prices:\\n            log.warning(\\\"agent_loop.no_prices\\\", msg=\\\"Could not fetch prices, skipping tick\\\")\\n            return\\n\\n        store.update(prices=current_prices, tick=self.tick_count)\\n\\n        # Step 2: Check stop-loss / take-profit on open positions\\n        closed = self.portfolio.check_stop_loss_take_profit(current_prices)\\n        if closed:\\n            log.info(\\\"agent_loop.auto_closed\\\", pairs=closed)\\n            for pair in closed:\\n                # Log the auto-close trade\\n                last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1] if self.executor.order_history else None\\n                if last_order:\\n                    store.add_trade({\\n                        \\\"time\\\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\\n                        \\\"pair\\\": pair,\\n                        \\\"side\\\": \\\"SELL\\\",\\n                        \\\"price\\\": last_order.price,\\n                        \\\"cost\\\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\\n                        \\\"reason\\\": last_order.reason,\\n                        \\\"status\\\": \\\"FILLED\\\",\\n                    })\\n\\n        # Step 3: Fetch candles and run strategy on each pair\\n        all_candles = self.feed.fetch_all_pairs(limit=self.strategy.required_history + 10)\\n\\n        for pair, candles in all_candles.items():\\n            if candles.empty:\\n                continue\\n\\n            # Run the strategy\\n            recommendation = self.strategy.evaluate(pair, candles)\\n\\n            log.info(\\n                \\\"agent_loop.signal\\\",\\n                pair=pair,\\n                signal=recommendation.signal.value,\\n                confidence=recommendation.confidence,\\n                reason=recommendation.reason,\\n            )\\n\\n            # Log signal to shared state\\n            store.add_signal({\\n                \\\"time\\\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\\n                \\\"pair\\\": pair,\\n                \\\"signal\\\": recommendation.signal.value,\\n                \\\"confidence\\\": recommendation.confidence,\\n                \\\"reason\\\": recommendation.reason,\\n                \\\"metadata\\\": recommendation.metadata,\\n            })\\n\\n            # Step 4: Execute signals through the portfolio manager\\n            if recommendation.signal == Signal.BUY:\\n                price = current_prices.get(pair, 0)\\n                if price > 0:\\n                    filled = self.portfolio.try_buy(\\n                        pair=pair,\\n                        price=price,\\n                        current_prices=current_prices,\\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\\n                    )\\n                    if filled:\\n                        last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1]\\n                        store.add_trade({\\n                            \\\"time\\\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\\n                            \\\"pair\\\": pair,\\n                            \\\"side\\\": \\\"BUY\\\",\\n                            \\\"price\\\": price,\\n                            \\\"quantity\\\": round(last_order.quantity, 8),\\n                            \\\"cost\\\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\\n                            \\\"reason\\\": recommendation.reason,\\n                            \\\"status\\\": \\\"FILLED\\\",\\n                        })\\n\\n            elif recommendation.signal == Signal.SELL:\\n                price = current_prices.get(pair, 0)\\n                if price > 0:\\n                    filled = self.portfolio.try_sell(\\n                        pair=pair,\\n                        price=price,\\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\\n                    )\\n                    if filled:\\n                        last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1]\\n                        store.add_trade({\\n                            \\\"time\\\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\\n round(last_order.quantity, 8),\\n                            \\\"cost\\\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\\n                            \\\"reason\\\": recommendation.reason,\\n                            \\\"status\\\": \\\"FILLED\\\",\\n                        })\\n\\n        # Step 5: Update shared state with portfolio snapshot\\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\\n        store.update(portfolio=summary)\\n        store.add_equity_point(summary[\\\"total_value\\\"])\\n\\n        log.info(\\n            \\\"agent_loop.portfolio\\\",\\n            cash=summary[\\\"cash\\\"],\\n            total_value=summary[\\\"total_value\\\"],\\n            pnl=summary[\\\"total_pnl\\\"],\\n            pnl_pct=summary[\\\"total_pnl_pct\\\"],\\n            open_positions=summary[\\\"open_positions\\\"],\\n            total_trades=summary[\\\"total_trades\\\"],\\n        )\\n\\n    def _print_final_summary(self) -> None:\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\"Print a final report when the agent shuts down.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        current_prices = self.feed.get_all_prices()\\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\\n\\n        log.info(\\\"=\\\" * 60)\\n        log.info(\\\"agent_loop.final_report\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Total ticks:      {self.tick_count}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Total trades:     {summary['total_trades']}\\\")\\n         ${summary['total_pnl']:,.2f} ({summary['total_pnl_pct']:.2f}%)\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Cash remaining:   ${summary['cash']:,.2f}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Open positions:       "file_text": "\"\"\"\nAgent Loop \u2014 the main orchestrator.\n\nOn each tick:\n  1. Fetch fresh candle data\n  2. Check stop-loss / take-profit on open positions\n  3. Run the strategy on each pair\n  4. Execute any BUY/SELL signals through the portfolio manager\n  5. Update shared state for the live dashboard\n  6. Log the portfolio summary\n\"\"\"\n\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport time\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\n\nimport structlog\n\nfrom agent.config import AgentConfig\nfrom agent.strategies.base import Signal, BaseStrategy\nfrom agent.strategies.loader import load_strategy\nfrom agent.state import store\nfrom market_data.feed import MarketDataFeed\nfrom execution.paper import PaperExecutor, OrderStatus\nfrom portfolio.manager import PortfolioManager\n\nlog = structlog.get_logger()\n\n\nclass AgentLoop:\n    \"\"\"\n    Wires all components together and runs the trading loop.\n\n    Parameters\n    ----------\n    cfg : AgentConfig\n        The full, validated agent configuration.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, cfg: AgentConfig) -> None:\n        self.cfg = cfg\n        self.tick_count: int = 0\n\n        # Build components\n        self.feed = MarketDataFeed(cfg.exchange, cfg.trading)\n        self.strategy: BaseStrategy = load_strategy(cfg.strategy.name, cfg.strategy.params)\n        self.executor = PaperExecutor(cfg.paper.starting_balance)\n        self.portfolio = PortfolioManager(cfg.risk, self.executor)\n\n        # Initialize shared state\n        store.update(\n            status=\"initializing\",\n            mode=cfg.mode,\n            exchange=cfg.exchange.name,\n            strategy=cfg.strategy.name,\n            timeframe=cfg.trading.default_timeframe,\n            pairs=cfg.trading.pairs,\n        )\n\n    def start(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Connect to the exchange and begin the loop.\"\"\"\n        log.info(\n            \"agent_loop.starting\",\n            strategy=self.strategy.name,\n            pairs=self.cfg.trading.pairs,\n            interval_s=self.cfg.scheduler.strategy_interval_seconds,\n            mode=self.cfg.mode,\n        )\n\n        self.feed.connect()\n        store.update(status=\"running\")\n\n        log.info(\"agent_loop.running\", msg=\"Agent is live. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\")\n\n        try:\n            while True:\n                self._tick()\n                time.sleep(self.cfg.scheduler.strategy_interval_seconds)\n        except KeyboardInterrupt:\n            store.update(status=\"stopped\")\n            log.info(\"agent_loop.stopped\", msg=\"Shutdown by user (Ctrl+C)\")\n            self._print_final_summary()\n\n    def _tick(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Execute one cycle of the trading loop.\"\"\"\n        self.tick_count += 1\n        log.info(\"agent_loop.tick\", tick=self.tick_count)\n\n        # Step 1: Fetch current prices\n        current_prices = self.feed.get_all_prices()\n        if not current_prices:\n            log.warning(\"agent_loop.no_prices\", msg=\"Could not fetch prices, skipping tick\")\n            return\n\n        store.update(prices=current_prices, tick=self.tick_count)\n\n        # Step 2: Check stop-loss / take-profit\n        closed = self.portfolio.check_stop_loss_take_profit(current_prices)\n        if closed:\n            log.info(\"agent_loop.auto_closed\", pairs=closed)\n            for pair in closed:\n                last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1] if self.executor.order_history else None\n                if last_order:\n                    store.add_trade({\n                        \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                        \"pair\": pair,\n                        \"side\": \"SELL\",\n                        \"price\": last_order.price,\n                        \"cost\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\n                        \"reason\": last_order.reason,\n                        \"status\": \"FILLED\",\n                    })\n\n        # Step 3: Fetch candles and run strategy\n        all_candles = self.feed.fetch_all_pairs(limit=self.strategy.required_history + 10)\n\n        for pair, candles in all_candles.items():\n            if candles.empty:\n                continue\n\n            recommendation = self.strategy.evaluate(pair, candles)\n\n            log.info(\n                \"agent_loop.signal\",\n                pair=pair,\n                signal=recommendation.signal.value,\n                confidence=recommendation.confidence,\n                reason=recommendation.reason,\n            )\n\n            store.add_signal({\n                \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                \"pair\": pair,\n                \"signal\": recommendation.signal.value,\n                \"confidence\": recommendation.confidence,\n                \"reason\": recommendation.reason,\n                \"metadata\": recommendation.metadata,\n            })\n\n            # Step 4: Execute signals\n            if recommendation.signal == Signal.BUY:\n                price = current_prices.get(pair, 0)\n                if price > 0:\n                    filled = self.portfolio.try_buy(\n                        pair=pair, price=price,\n                        current_prices=current_prices,\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\n                    )\n                    if filled:\n                        last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1]\n                        store.add_trade({\n                            \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                            \"pair\": pair, \"side\": \"BUY\",\n                            \"price\": price,\n                            \"quantity\": round(last_order.quantity, 8),\n                            \"cost\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\n                            \"reason\": recommendation.reason,\n                            \"status\": \"FILLED\",\n                        })\n\n            elif recommendation.signal == Signal.SELL:\n                price = current_prices.get(pair, 0)\n                if price > 0:\n                    filled = self.portfolio.try_sell(\n                        pair=pair, price=price,\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\n                    )\n                    if filled:\n                        last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1]\n                        store.add_trade({\n                            \"time\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\n                            \"pair\": pair, \"side\": \"SELL\",\n                            \"price\": price,\n                            \"quantity\": round(last_order.quantity, 8),\n                            \"cost\": round(last_order.cost, 2),\n                            \"reason\": recommendation.reason,\n                            \"status\": \"FILLED\",\n                        })\n\n        # Step 5: Update shared state\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\n        store.update(portfolio=summary)\n        store.add_equity_point(summary[\"total_value\"])\n\n        log.info(\n            \"agent_loop.portfolio\",\n            cash=summary[\"cash\"],\n            total_value=summary[\"total_value\"],\n            pnl=summary[\"total_pnl\"],\n            pnl_pct=summary[\"total_pnl_pct\"],\n            open_positions=summary[\"open_positions\"],\n            total_trades=summary[\"total_trades\"],\n        )\n\n    def _print_final_summary(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Print a final report when the agent shuts down.\"\"\"\n        current_prices = self.feed.get_all_prices()\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\n\n        log.info(\"=\" * 60)\n        log.info(\"agent_loop.final_report\")\n        log.info(f\"  Total ticks:      {self.tick_count}\")\n        log.info(f\"  Total trades:     {summary['total_trades']}\")\n        log.info(f\"  Starting balance: ${self.executor.starting_balance:,.2f}\")\n        log.info(f\"  Final value:      ${summary['total_value']:,.2f}\")\n        log.info(f\"  P&L:              ${summary['total_pnl']:,.2f} ({summary['total_pnl_pct']:.2f}%)\")\n        log.info(f\"  Cash remaining:   ${summary['cash']:,.2f}\")\n        log.info(f\"  Open positions:   {summary['open_positions']}\")\n        log.info(\"=\" * 60)\n",

current_prices.get(pair, 0)\\n                if price > 0:\\n                    filled = self.portfolio.try_sell(\\n                        pair=pair, price=price,\\n                        reason=recommendation.reason,\\n                    )\\n                    if filled:\\n                        last_order = self.executor.order_history[-1]\\n           \\\"reason\\\": recommendation.reason,\\n                            \\\"status\\\": \\\"FILLED\\\",\\n                        })\\n\\n        # Step 5: Update shared state\\n        summary = self.executor.summary(current_prices)\\n        store.update(portfolio=summary)\\n        store.add_equity_point(summary[\\\"total_value\\\"])\\n\\n        log.info(\\n            \\\"agent_loop.portfolio\\\",\\n            cash=summary[\\\"cash\\\"],\\n            total_value=summary[\\\"total_value\\\"],\\n            pnl=summary[\\\"total_pnl\\\"],\\n self.executor.summary(current_prices)\\n\\n        log.info(\\\"=\\\" * 60)\\n        log.info(\\\"agent_loop.final_report\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Total ticks:      {self.tick_count}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Total trades:     {summary['total_trades']}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Starting balance: ${self.executor.starting_balance:,.2f}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Final value:      ${summary['total_value']:,.2f}\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  P&L:              ${summary['total_pnl']:,.2f} ({summary['total_pnl_pct']:.2f}%)\\\")\\n        log.info(f\\\"  Cash remaining: 'simple');\n  document.getElementById('btnSimple').classList.toggle('active', mode === 'simple');\n  document.getElementById('btnAdvanced').classList.toggle('active', mode === 'advanced');\n  localStorage.setItem('dashboardMode', mode);\n}\n\n// --- Data Fetch ---\nasync function fetchState() {\n  try {\n    document.getElementById('refreshBar').classList.add('active');\n    const resp = await fetch('/api/state');\n    const state = await resp.json();\n    lastState = state;\n    updateUI(state);\n    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('refreshBar').classList.remove('active'), 500);\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error('Fetch failed:', e);\n  }\n}\n\n// --- UI Update ---\nfunction updateUI(s) {\n  // Status badge\n  const badge = document.getElementById('statusBadge');\n
